query: SELECT n.id, n.node_id, n.name, n.region, n.sub_region, n.latitude, n.longitude, n.real_world_name, n.level_range, n.description, COUNT(npc.id) as npc_count FROM game_map_nodes n LEFT JOIN game_npc_catalog npc ON npc.map_node_id = n.id GROUP BY n.id ORDER BY n.region, n.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT n.id, n.node_id, n.name, n.region, n.sub_region, n.latitude, n.longitude, n.real_world_name, n.level_range, n.description, COUNT(npc.id) as npc_count FROM game_map_nodes n LEFT JOIN game_npc_catalog npc ON npc.map_node_id = n.id GROUP BY n.id ORDER BY n.region, n.id
